title: Show HN: Tanstaafl – Pay-to-inbox email on Bitcoin Lightning
full_text:
I build things. Usually software. Sometimes movements.
 

I got tired of watching my inbox become a war zone. Tired of the daily assault of garbage. Tired of watching smart people waste hours on email that never should have existed.
 

So I built this. It's live. It works. And it's changing how I think about email.
 

TANSTAAFL Mail isn't just a product. It's a statement: Your attention is valuable. Your time is finite. If someone wants a piece of either, they should be willing to prove it.
 

We're using Bitcoin because it's the only money that moves at the speed of the internet, can't be censored, and doesn't need anyone's permission.
 

Bitcoin succeeds when it solves real problems. Not speculation. Not "number go up." Actually making life better. Removing garbage from your inbox. Giving your attention a price. That's what sound money is for.
 

Join us. Your inbox will thank you.
